message:
test(harness): stdlib_conversion harness-matrix subprocess coverage (bd-jui3)

Adds stdlib_conversion_fixture_executes_with_host_parity_via_harness_matrix
which dispatches every fixture case through the
`harness conformance-matrix-case` subprocess. Same code path the CI
conformance matrix uses, so packaging/dispatch regressions surface
even when the in-process executor still passes. Existing in-process
oracle (stdlib_conversion_fixture_cases_match_execute_fixture_case) is
preserved.

Covers atoi/atol/strtol/strtoul + base/overflow/negative/whitespace
edge cases across strict and hardened modes.

Verification (rch + isolated CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_libc_4):
  cargo test  -p frankenlibc-harness --test stdlib_conversion_conformance_test
                                                     13 passed
  cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-harness --all-targets -- -D warnings  clean
  cargo fmt --check -p frankenlibc-harness          clean
  ubs <touched>                                       exit 0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
